allow: Bash(psql -U postgres -d pokemon_card_db -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM cards;")
Bash(psql -U postgres -d pokemon_card_db -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM products;")

Bash(psql -U postgres -d pokemon_card_db -c "SELECT prefix, cnt FROM \(SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE\(official_card_code, ''[0-9].*'', ''''\) AS prefix, COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM cards GROUP BY prefix ORDER BY cnt DESC\) t LIMIT 10;")
Bash(for SET in sv2 sv4 sv7 sv8 sv10)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT DISTINCT ON \(c.ptcg_set_id\) c.official_card_code, c.ptcg_set_id, c.scrydex_slug, c.name_ko
FROM cards c
WHERE c.tcgplayer_card_id IS NULL
  AND c.ptcg_set_id IS NOT NULL
  AND c.rarity_code = ANY\(ARRAY['SSR','SAR','BWR','CSR','CHR','UR','SR','AR']\)
ORDER BY c.ptcg_set_id, c.official_card_code
LIMIT 40;" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -c "\\d cards")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -c "\\d products")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -c "\\d ptcg_set_mappings" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT DISTINCT ON \(m.ptcg_set_id\) c.official_card_code, m.ptcg_set_id, c.scrydex_slug, c.name
FROM cards c
JOIN ptcg_set_mappings m ON m.product_id = c.product_id
WHERE c.tcgplayer_card_id IS NULL
  AND c.scrydex_slug IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY m.ptcg_set_id, c.official_card_code
LIMIT 50;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT DISTINCT ON \(m.ptcg_set_id\) c.official_card_code, m.ptcg_set_id, c.scrydex_slug, c.name,
       COUNT\(*\) OVER \(PARTITION BY m.ptcg_set_id\) as set_fail_count
FROM cards c
JOIN ptcg_set_mappings m ON m.product_id = c.product_id
WHERE c.tcgplayer_card_id IS NULL
  AND c.scrydex_slug IS NOT NULL
  AND m.ptcg_set_id IN \('sm10b','sm12a','sv1a','sv3pt5','sv4pt5','sv6','sv6pt5','sv8a','swsh3','swsh12','swsh12a','bw7','sm8b','sm9'\)
ORDER BY m.ptcg_set_id, c.official_card_code;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -c "
SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM cards WHERE tcgplayer_card_id IS NOT NULL;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -c "
SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM cards WHERE tcgplayer_card_id IS NULL AND scrydex_slug IS NOT NULL;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT DISTINCT ON \(c.scrydex_slug, m.ptcg_set_id\) 
  c.official_card_code, m.ptcg_set_id, c.scrydex_slug, c.name
FROM cards c
JOIN ptcg_set_mappings m ON m.product_id = c.product_id
WHERE c.tcgplayer_card_id IS NULL
  AND c.scrydex_slug IN \(
    'bosss-orders-ghetsis','emergency-jelly','buddy-buddy-poffin',
    'pokemon-switch','pepper','adventurers-discovery','poppy',
    'professors-research','big-mouth-bog','basic-darkness-energy',
    'basic-fighting-energy'
  \)
ORDER BY c.scrydex_slug, m.ptcg_set_id, c.official_card_code;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT DISTINCT ON \(c.scrydex_slug, m.ptcg_set_id\)
  c.official_card_code, m.ptcg_set_id, c.scrydex_slug, c.name
FROM cards c
JOIN ptcg_set_mappings m ON m.product_id = c.product_id
WHERE c.tcgplayer_card_id IS NULL
  AND c.scrydex_slug IN \('brock','professor-elm','molayne','adventurers-discovery','campfire','lost-sweeper','buddy-buddy-poffin'\)
ORDER BY c.scrydex_slug, m.ptcg_set_id, c.official_card_code;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -c "
SELECT 
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE tcgplayer_card_id IS NOT NULL\) as mapped,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE tcgplayer_card_id IS NULL AND scrydex_slug IS NOT NULL\) as unmapped,
  COUNT\(*\) as total
FROM cards;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -c "
SELECT 
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE c.tcgplayer_card_id IS NOT NULL\) as mapped,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE c.tcgplayer_card_id IS NULL AND c.scrydex_slug IS NOT NULL\) as unmapped_has_slug,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE c.tcgplayer_card_id IS NULL AND c.scrydex_slug IS NULL\) as no_slug,
  COUNT\(*\) as total
FROM cards c
JOIN ptcg_set_mappings m ON m.product_id = c.product_id;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -c "
SELECT 
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE tcgplayer_card_id IS NOT NULL\) as en_mapped,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE scrydex_slug IS NOT NULL\) as jp_has_slug,
  COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE tcgplayer_card_id IS NOT NULL AND scrydex_slug IS NOT NULL\) as both,
  COUNT\(*\) as total
FROM cards
WHERE language = 'KO';" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -c "
SELECT image_url FROM cards WHERE language='KO' AND image_url IS NOT NULL LIMIT 3;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT rarity_code, COUNT\(*\) as cnt
FROM cards
WHERE language = 'KO'
GROUP BY rarity_code
ORDER BY cnt DESC;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT p.name, c.rarity_code, COUNT\(*\) 
FROM cards c JOIN products p ON p.product_id = c.product_id
WHERE c.language = 'KO' AND c.rarity_code = 'PR'
GROUP BY p.name, c.rarity_code
ORDER BY COUNT\(*\) DESC;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT p.name, p.product_id, COUNT\(*\) as card_cnt
FROM products p JOIN cards c ON c.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE p.language = 'KO' AND \(p.name ILIKE '%프로모%' OR p.name ILIKE '%P%' OR p.name ILIKE '%홍보%'\)
GROUP BY p.name, p.product_id
ORDER BY card_cnt DESC LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT c.rarity_code, c.name, p.name as product
FROM cards c JOIN products p ON p.product_id = c.product_id
WHERE c.language = 'KO' AND c.rarity_code IN \('H','HR','ACE','RR'\)
GROUP BY c.rarity_code, c.name, p.name
LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT c.official_card_code, c.name, c.rarity_code, c.collection_number, p.name as product
FROM cards c JOIN products p ON p.product_id = c.product_id
WHERE c.language = 'KO' AND c.official_card_code LIKE 'SVP%'
LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT c.official_card_code, c.name, c.rarity_code, c.collection_number, c.scrydex_slug, p.name as product
FROM cards c JOIN products p ON p.product_id = c.product_id
WHERE c.official_card_code = 'SVP000000173';" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT rarity_code, COUNT\(*\) as total,
  COUNT\(image_url\) as has_image,
  COUNT\(scrydex_slug\) as has_slug
FROM cards 
WHERE language='KO' AND rarity_code IN \('RR','HR','ACE','PR','H'\)
GROUP BY rarity_code ORDER BY rarity_code;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total, COUNT\(image_url\) as has_image, COUNT\(scrydex_slug\) as has_slug
FROM cards WHERE language='KO' AND official_card_code LIKE 'SVP%';" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT p.name, MAX\(c.created_at\)::date as last_added, COUNT\(*\) as cards
FROM cards c JOIN products p ON p.product_id = c.product_id
WHERE c.language='KO'
GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY last_added DESC LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -c "
SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM cards WHERE language='KO' AND \(hp IS NULL OR card_type IS NULL\)
AND \(rarity_code = ANY\(ARRAY['SSR','SAR','BWR','CSR','CHR','UR','SR','AR','HR','ACE','RR','PR','H']\)
OR official_card_code LIKE 'SVP%'\);" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -c "
SELECT DISTINCT super_type FROM cards WHERE language='KO' LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN official_card_code LIKE 'SVP%' THEN 'SV-P\(프로모\)' ELSE rarity_code END as 등급,
  COUNT\(*\) as 장수
FROM cards
WHERE language='KO'
  AND \(rarity_code = ANY\(ARRAY['SSR','SAR','BWR','CSR','CHR','UR','SR','AR','HR','ACE','RR','PR','H']\)
    OR official_card_code LIKE 'SVP%'\)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 장수 DESC;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT sub_type, COUNT\(*\) FROM cards 
WHERE language='KO' AND name LIKE '%V-UNION%'
GROUP BY sub_type;

SELECT rarity_code, COUNT\(*\) FROM cards
WHERE language='KO' AND sub_type = 'VUNION'
GROUP BY rarity_code;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT official_card_code, name, rarity_code, sub_type, collection_number
FROM cards WHERE language='KO' AND name LIKE '%V-UNION%' LIMIT 8;" 2>&1)
Bash(__NEW_LINE_4c6a36b65e504a15__ PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -c ":*)
Bash(__NEW_LINE_5bb790dbaf661122__ PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -F'|' -c ":*)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -c "
SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM cards WHERE language='KO'
AND \(hp IS NULL OR card_type IS NULL OR rarity_code IS NULL\)
AND \(
  rarity_code = ANY\(ARRAY['SSR','SAR','BWR','CSR','CHR','UR','SR','AR','HR','ACE','RR','RRR','PR','H']\)
  OR official_card_code LIKE 'SVP%'
  OR \(rarity_code IS NULL AND \(name LIKE '%VMAX%' OR name LIKE '%VSTAR%' OR name LIKE '%V-UNION%'\)\)
\);" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -c "
SELECT official_card_code FROM cards WHERE language='KO' AND name='라이츄' AND rarity_code='SR' LIMIT 1;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="" psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -t -A -c "
SELECT official_card_code, rarity_code, collection_number FROM cards WHERE language='KO' AND name='라이츄' LIMIT 3;" 2>&1)
Bash(psql -d pokemon_card_db -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE rarity_code IS NULL\) AS null_rarity FROM cards WHERE language=''''KO'''' AND name LIKE ''''%찬란한%'''';")

Bash(psql -d pokemon_card_db -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE rarity_code IS NULL\) AS null_rarity, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE rarity_code=''''K''''\) AS k_count FROM cards WHERE language=''''KO'''' AND name LIKE ''''%찬란한%'''';")
Bash(psql -d pokemon_card_db -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM cards WHERE language=''''KO'''' AND name LIKE ''''%찬란한%'''' AND rarity_code IS NULL;")

Bash(psql -d pokemon_card_db -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as pokemonkorea_remaining FROM cards WHERE language=''''KO'''' AND image_url LIKE ''''%pokemonkorea%'''' AND rarity_code = ANY\(ARRAY[''''SSR'''',''''SAR'''',''''BWR'''',''''CSR'''',''''CHR'''',''''UR'''',''''SR'''',''''AR'''',''''HR'''',''''ACE'''',''''RR'''',''''RRR'''',''''PR'''',''''H'''',''''K'''']\);")
Bash(PGPASSWORD='' psql -h localhost -U nightfury -d pokemon_card_db -tAc "\\d products")

Bash(xargs -I{} sh -c 'echo "=== {} ===" && python3 -c " import json, sys try: with open\(sys.argv[1]\) as f: d = json.load\(f\) if isinstance\(d, list\): for item in d: if isinstance\(item, dict\) and item.get\(\\"name\\"\) in [\\"이브이\\",\\"레쿠쟈 V\\",\\"브케인\\",\\"삐\\",\\"모토마 ex\\",\\"아케오스\\",\\"N의 불비달마\\",\\"자루도 V\\",\\"알로라 나시 ex\\",\\"레지기가스\\",\\"아르세우스 V\\"]: print\(item\) except: pass " {} 2>/dev/null')

Bash(xargs -I{} python3 -c " import json, sys try: with open\(sys.argv[1]\) as f: d = json.load\(f\) names = ['이브이','레쿠쟈 V','브케인','삐','모토마 ex','아케오스','N의 불비달마','자루도 V','알로라 나시 ex','레지기가스','아르세우스 V'] found = [] if isinstance\(d, list\): for item in d: if isinstance\(item, dict\) and item.get\('name'\) in names: found.append\(item.get\('name'\)\) if found: print\(sys.argv[1], found\) except: pass " {})
